data.title: Bluejay Diagnostics Provides Corporate Update and 2026 Strategic Outlook
data.description: In ACTON, Massachusetts, on March 6, 2026, Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: BJDX), a healthcare company focusing on quick near-patient tests for enhanced critical care patient results, shared a corporate update. The update showcased recent advancements and outlined the Company's strategic direction up to 2026.

data.title: FTAI Aviation Announces CFO Transition
data.description: In New York on March 6, 2026, FTAI Aviation Ltd. (NASDAQ: FTAI) revealed Nicholas McAleese as the new Chief Financial Officer and Michael Hazan as the Chief Accounting Officer. The appointments are effective immediately.

data.title: SABINE ROYALTY TRUST ANNOUNCES MONTHLY CASH DISTRIBUTION FOR MARCH 2026
data.description: Argent Trust Company, in its role as Trustee of the Sabine Royalty Trust (NYSE: SBR), announced a cash distribution of $0.286230 per unit for its beneficial interest holders. The payment is scheduled for March 30, 2026, and will be disbursed to unit holders listed on record as of March 16.

data.title: Nota AI Reduces Memory Usage of Upstage's Solar LLM by 72%, Demonstrating Proprietary Quantization Technology
data.description: A revolutionary approach named "Nota AI MoE Quantization" has been introduced to maintain model performance while drastically enhancing memory efficiency. Nota AI, a South Korea-based AI optimization technology firm, revealed this innovation on March 5, 2026. This cutting-edge technique aims to improve the processing speed of AI models while consuming less memory. This development by Nota AI has garnered significant attention for its potential to revolutionize the AI industry.

data.title: Four Winds Saudi Arabia Strengthens Supply Chain Continuity Across the GCC with Flexible Logistics Solutions
data.description: Amid ongoing regional changes, a prominent Riyadh-based company, Four Winds Saudi Arabia, has reiterated its long-standing commitment to providing top-notch moving and logistics services. With over five decades of expertise since its establishment in 1971, the company remains fully prepared to guarantee uninterrupted supply chains.

data.title: Continuation of incentive programme
data.description: Since 2003, Schouw & Co. has implemented long-term incentive plans for senior managers with the aim of enhancing value creation within the company. The revised programme strives to align the interests of participants and the company's shareholders to drive growth and success.

data.title: Lithium Royalty Corp. Announces Portfolio Updates
data.description: In Toronto, Lithium Royalty Corp. (LRC) (TSX: LIRC) has shared updates on its royalty portfolio. The company recently acquired a Trailing Product Sales Fee royalty on the Goulamina lithium project in Mali from Ganfeng Lithium Co, Ltd. in late December 2026. This acquisition entitled LRC to receive the Q4 2025 payment for this royalty. The details of this deal have not been disclosed, but it marks a significant development for LRC. This move reflects the company's strategic efforts to expand its presence and investments in the lithium sector, aiming to capitalize on the growing demand for lithium in various industries. This acquisition aligns with LRC's long-term goals and commitment to maximizing shareholder value. The specific financial terms and impact of this acquisition on LRC's overall portfolio have not been revealed.
